note: These bills were dropped by an earlier version of the include regex that only matched lowercase 'as state'. They must pass the current filter. Regression harness.
synopsis: Designates Common Eastern Bumble Bee as New Jersey State Native Pollinator.
Designates "New Jersey's For You and Me" by Kathleen Golden Murphy and Shannon Murphy Flannery as New Jersey State song.
Designates "John Bull" as NJ State steam locomotive.
Designates salt water taffy as New Jersey State Candy.
Designates March 30th of each year "Menstrual Toxic Shock Syndrome Awareness Day."
